contributor_note: Seeded from common horticultural knowledge. Needs primary source verification.

habit.note: Drops leaves in cold or low light — do not panic, it will regrow.

notes: Intensely lemon-scented — stronger than lemon balm or lemon thyme. No frost tolerance. Drops leaves in cold or low light — do not panic, it regrows. Excellent for tea. Needs good drainage.
